---
title: "UI"
search: true
format:
  html:
    code-link: true
    smooth-scroll: true
---

::::: {.grid .step .column-page-right}
::: {.g-col-lg-8 .g-col-12}
``` {#load-packages .r}
# Dynamic Borrowing Shiny Application 

require(bslib)
require(dplyr)
require(purrr)
require(DT)
require(readxl)
require(plotly)
library(shiny)
require(psborrow)
require(shinyFeedback)
library(shinyjs)
library(RBesT)
library(shinybusy)
library(ggpubr)
library(bayesplot)
```

``` {#other-options .r}
# Get all R script files in the functions directory and its subdirectories
files <- list.files("functions", pattern = "\\.R$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
walk(files, source)

options(shiny.maxRequestSize = 50 * 1024^2)
```

``` r
ui <- navbarPage(
  useShinyjs(),  # Initialize shinyjs
  header = tags$head(tags$style(HTML(".navbar-default .navbar-nav > li > a:hover {color: black;background-color: #f7bfc2; text-decoration:underline;}
                                     body {font-size: 15px;}  /* 全局字体大小 */
                                     .navbar-brand, .navbar-nav > li > a {font-size: 18px;} 
                                     .tab-content {font-size: 16px;}  
                                     .custom-label {font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold;} 
                                     button, .btn {
                                        background-color: #FD8B01 !important; 
                                        border: none !important; 
                                     }
                                     ")),
                     withMathJax()),
  theme = bs_theme(bootswatch = "minty", primary = "#be2bbb", 'navbar-inverse-bg' = "#f7bfc2", 
                   'navbar-bg' = "#f1d4f1", "progress-bar-bg" = "#be2bbb"), 
  title = "Dynamic Borrowing",

  ### Data Section ####
  tabPanel(title = "Data",
           fluidPage(
             sidebarLayout(
               ### Data - Side Bar
               sidebarPanel(width = 3, 
                            module_UI_data_sidebar("data_sidebar")
                           ),

               ### Data - Main Panel
               mainPanel(type = "tabs", width = 9, 
                         tabsetPanel(
                         #### Data Input ####
                         tabPanel(title = "Data Input", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom",
                                  # Simulate Datasets
                                  module_UI_simulate_data("simu_data"),
                                  # Upload Datasets 
                                  module_UI_upload_data("upload_data")
                                  )
                         #### Data Visulization ####
                        #  tabPanel(title = "Data Visulization", 
                        #           class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom",
                        #           module_UI_generate_data("generate_data")
                        #  ), 
                        #   
                        #  #### Advanced Settings ####
                        #  tabPanel(title = "Advanced Settings", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom")
                        )
               ),
               position = c("left", "right")
             )
           )
  ),
  
  
  # Simulation #### 
  tabPanel(title = "Simulation", 
           fluidPage(
             sidebarLayout(
               sidebarPanel(width = 3,
                            module_UI_simu_sidebar("simu_sidebar")
               ), 
               mainPanel(type = "tabs", width = 9,
                 tabsetPanel(
                   tabPanel(
                     title = "Simulation Using One Method", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom",
                     module_UI_simu_one_method("simu_one_method")
                   ) 
                   # tabPanel(
                   #   title = "Comparison Across Multiple Methods", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom"
                   # )
                 )
               )
             )
            )
           ),
  
  # Instruction ####
  tabPanel("Instruction", 
           class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom",
           tabsetPanel(
             tabPanel("Data Panel", 
                      class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom",
                      div(tags$iframe(style = "height:100vh; width:100%; border:none; overflow:hidden;", 
                                      src = "instruction/data/_site/introduction.html"))
                      ),
             tabPanel("Simulation Panel", 
                      class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom",
                      div(tags$iframe(style = "height:100vh; width:100%; border:none; overflow:hidden;", 
                                      src = "instruction/simulation/_site/introduction.html"))
                      )
             )
  ),
  
  # Section #### 
  section_UI_guidance("guidance")

)
```
:::

::: {.g-col-lg-4 .g-col-12}
-   Data Panel:
    -   [module_UI_data_sidebar](main/module_data_sidebar.qmd#module_UI_data_sidebar)
        -   ID: `data_sidebar`
    -   [module_UI_simulate_data](main/module_data_simulate.qmd#module_UI_simulate_data)
        -   ID: `simu_data`
    -   [module_UI_upload_data]()
        -   ID: `upload_data`
-   Simulation Panel:
    -   [module_UI_simu_sidebar]()
        -   ID: `simu_sidebar`
    -   [module_UI_simu_one_method]()
        -   ID: `simu_one_method`
-   Instruction Panel:
    -   For data panel: "instruction/data/\_site/introduction.html"
    -   For simulation panel: "instruction/simulation/\_site/introduction.html"
-   Guidance Panel:
    -   [section_UI_guidance]()
        -   ID: `guidance`
:::
:::::
